title: Smoke Pot's
description: A simple mod that adds smoke potions
body:
A simple mod that adds a smoke potion that summons a circle of smoke that fades away after some time. 

This mod was made for "Upcoming Project that is not approved yet" Check link for more info               
"Https://modrinth.com/modpack/TBD"

Avalble for Fabric and Forge.                         
(Fabric needs Fabric API)
